findings.description: All 9 theorem names cited in paper exist in HeatKernelExpansion.lean by exact name: a2_R_coefficient_eq_zero_iff (L147), G_N_from_a2_eq_G_N_sakharov (L255), a4_R_sq_coef_neg (L338), a4_Ricci_sq_coef_pos (L351), a4_Riemann_sq_coef_neg (L359), a4_gauss_bonnet_combination (L378), a2_matches_GNemerg_iff_alpha_ADW_unity (L403), G_N_from_a2_at_GUT_inverse (L285), G_N_from_a2_inverse_at_GUT_below_planck_squared (L297). Tracked-hypothesis structure DiracHeatKernelAsymptotic (L187) also present.

All 4 LinearizedEFE theorems referenced exist: G_N_sakharov (L227), G_N_sakharov_pos (L231), G_N_emerg (L274), G_N_emerg_at_alpha_one (L278). Cross-bridge G_N_from_a2_eq_G_N_sakharov proof body (L256-258) literally invokes SKEFTHawking.LinearizedEFE.G_N_sakharov by full name via unfold; backward direction of biconditional (L420-422) invokes G_N_emerg_at_alpha_one. Paper P6 cross-module bridge integrity satisfied.

GUT anchor 1/G_N = 15·10^32/(12π) ≈ 3.98e31 GeV^2 verified: computed 3.9789e31, paper claim 3.98e31, rel err 0.028% << 0.5%. M_P^2 ≈ 1.49e38 GeV^2 (CODATA m_P=1.22e19) verified: 1.4884e38 vs 1.49e38, rel err 0.11%.

Christensen-Duff rationals -5/(12·180), 7/(12·180), -12/(12·180) reproduced exactly by both Lean def (L322-335) and Python (src/core/formulas.py:seeley_dewitt_a4_basis). Gauss-Bonnet local combination -45/(12·180) = -1/48 verified exactly (Lean L378, Python).

Paper macro \heatKernelThms{19} matches 19 top-level theorems in HeatKernelExpansion.lean. Section breakdown 2+2+3+2+3+2+4+1 = 19 (Lean places a2_eq_closed_form in §5; paper section partitioning differs by 1 between §4 and §5 but total is identical).
Paper macro \heatKernelTests{36} matches actual pytest count: tests/test_heat_kernel.py contains 36 test functions.
Zero sorry in HeatKernelExpansion.lean (grep -c sorry → 0). lake build SKEFTHawking.HeatKernelExpansion completed successfully. 'Zero sorry, zero new axioms' claims (tex L50, L396-398) verified.

All 5 canonical formula functions cited (tex L416-419) exist in src/core/formulas.py: seeley_dewitt_a0 (L8114), seeley_dewitt_a2_R_coefficient (L8144), seeley_dewitt_a4_basis (L8215), G_N_from_seeley_dewitt (L8176), heat_kernel_a2_matches_GN_sakharov (L8273). Python evaluator returns numerical match to paper Eq. 12 (1/G_N = 3.9789e31 vs claim 3.98e31).

a2_matches_GNemerg_iff_alpha_ADW_unity (L403-422) proof structure matches paper claim (tex L243-261): forward direction uses mul_right_cancel via G_N_sakharov_pos; reverse direction calls G_N_emerg_at_alpha_one. Both directions are substantive (not vacuous).

5 of 9 bibitems registered in src/core/citations.py CITATION_REGISTRY: Sakharov1968 (L2000), Adler1982 (L2015), Diakonov2011 (L616), VladimirovDiakonov2012 (L447), Vergeles2025 (L646). Of these, only Vergeles2025 has doi_verified: True. Others have doi_verified: None.

Bibitem Gilkey1995 (CRC Press 2nd ed, Atiyah-Singer Index Theorem) is cited in tex L481-484 and Lean docstring L41 but NOT registered in src/core/citations.py CITATION_REGISTRY. Book reference, no DOI expected; should still be added as a registered entry for traceability.
findings.remediation: Add Gilkey1995 entry to CITATION_REGISTRY in src/core/citations.py with doi: None, doi_verified: True (book published 1995, ISBN-traceable), used_in: ['papers/paper39_heat_kernel_expansion/paper_draft.tex'].

findings.description: Bibitem Vassilevich2003 (Phys. Rep. 388, 279, 'Heat kernel expansion: user's manual') is cited in tex L486-490 and Lean docstring L43 but NOT in CITATION_REGISTRY. Should be registered with arxiv: hep-th/0306138.
findings.remediation: Add Vassilevich2003 to CITATION_REGISTRY (doi 10.1016/j.physrep.2003.09.002, arxiv hep-th/0306138, doi_verified: None pending live check).

findings.description: Bibitem ChristensenDuff1979 (Nucl. Phys. B154, 301) is cited in tex L492-495, Lean docstring L44, and is the load-bearing rational-coefficient source. NOT in CITATION_REGISTRY.
findings.remediation: Add ChristensenDuff1979 to CITATION_REGISTRY (doi: 10.1016/0550-3213(79)90516-9 — verify on CrossRef before flipping doi_verified).

findings.description: Bibitem LinearizedEFE2026 (in-prep, Roehm) is cited in tex L476-479 (the paper23 self-reference) but not in CITATION_REGISTRY. Standard practice for in-prep self-cites.
findings.remediation: Optionally add LinearizedEFE2026 entry pointing to paper23_linearized_efe with note 'in preparation, this project'. Low priority — common to omit project self-cites until publication.

findings.description: PAPER_DEPENDENCIES dict in src/core/provenance.py does not contain a 'paper39_heat_kernel_expansion' entry. Other recent papers (paper29-paper38) also missing — this is a known systemic gap, not paper-specific. Validate.py CHECK 14 (paper claims trace to computation) cannot verify paper39 without this.
findings.remediation: Add paper39_heat_kernel_expansion entry to PAPER_DEPENDENCIES with formulas: ['seeley_dewitt_a0', 'seeley_dewitt_a2_R_coefficient', 'seeley_dewitt_a4_basis', 'G_N_from_seeley_dewitt', 'heat_kernel_a2_matches_GN_sakharov']; lean_modules: ['HeatKernelExpansion', 'LinearizedEFE']; key_claims listing the 5 main physics statements.

findings.description: Paper bibitem Vergeles2025 title is 'Unitarity of the diffeomorphism-invariant ADW lattice model' but CITATION_REGISTRY title is 'Unitarity of 4D Lattice Theory of Gravity' for the same DOI (10.1103/PhysRevD.112.054509). Paper rewording vs registry — registry should be the source of truth.
findings.remediation: Either update paper bibitem to match registry title verbatim, or update registry if registry is wrong. Suggested: keep registry title (matches arxiv 2506.00036) and adjust paper bibitem.

summary: Paper39 passes all hard gates: zero FAIL findings. All 9 cited Lean theorem names exist by exact name in HeatKernelExpansion.lean; all 4 LinearizedEFE cross-references resolve; the load-bearing G_N_from_a2_eq_G_N_sakharov cross-bridge substantively invokes G_N_sakharov by name (drift-protected). All numerical anchors (GUT 1/G_N = 3.98e31, M_P^2 = 1.49e38, a4 rationals, GB combo -1/48) verified to <0.1% via Python heat_kernel module. Theorem count (19) and test count (36) match paper macros. lake build clean, zero sorry, zero new axioms. Six WARNs are all citation-registry hygiene: 4 bibitems (Gilkey1995, Vassilevich2003, ChristensenDuff1979, LinearizedEFE2026) not in CITATION_REGISTRY; PAPER_DEPENDENCIES missing paper39 entry (systemic gap affecting paper29-39); Vergeles2025 title rewording. None of these block Stage 10 — they block Stage 14 submission readiness via standard citation-verification path.
